about: Whole families out of scope (collapsed in the reference)

CTRL-W.note: window management — ved has no vim windows

gJ.api: G_SEQUENCES 'gJ' — join removing only the newline

v_J.api: action 'visual.join' — join every selected line (policy spacing)

v_gJ.api: G_SEQUENCES 'gJ' in visual — join selected lines, newline only

ge.api: MotionId 'wordEndBack' — backward to the end of a word

gE.api: MotionId 'bigWordEndBack' — backward to the end of a WORD

g_.api: MotionId 'lastNonBlank' — to the last non-blank of the line

H.api: MotionId 'screenTop' — needs a viewport seam in VimDocView

L.api: MotionId 'screenBottom' — needs a viewport seam in VimDocView

M.api: MotionId 'screenMiddle' — needs a viewport seam in VimDocView

about: Stage: case operators (normal g-operators + their visual forms)

v_~.api: action 'visual.toggleCase' — swap case over the selection

about: Stage: indent operators (fullwidth-aware shiftwidth is the open design question — a 全角 indent cell vs. ASCII spaces)

>.api: operator 'indent' — shift Nmove lines one shiftwidth right

<.api: operator 'dedent' — shift Nmove lines one shiftwidth left

about: Stage: scrolling the caret line (the editor's scroll seam exists — scrollPage — these need a line-scoped variant)
Stage: named registers, then marks (each is a state-shape addition, not a binding tweak — sized as their own efforts)

quote.api: "{register} prefix — a registers map in VimState

about: Small extras once their dependencies land

gp.api: paste variant — cursor AFTER the pasted text

gP.api: paste variant — cursor AFTER the pasted text
